case_title: ANTONELLI & SONS FISH & POULTRY VS. PHILIP FELLMAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JEREMY PASTERNAK RE : ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANTONELLI & SONS FISH & POULTRY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-25-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
